title: Giant Crisps Multipack Snack Box Walkers Crisps Snack Variety Box 60 Pack Quavers Baked Wotsits Mega Monster Munch Cheesy Flavour Crisps Snack Mix for Party, Office, Movie Nights & School Lunchbox
features: VARIETY PACK: Contains 60 snack packs featuring Quavers, Wotsits, and Monster Munch in popular flavours including cheese, roast beef, pickled onion and flamin' hot
PERFECT FOR SHARING: Ideal multipack box for parties, offices, movie nights and school lunchboxes with individually wrapped portions for convenience
FLAVOUR SELECTION: Includes 24 Quavers cheese flavour, 24 Wotsits really cheesy, and 12 Monster Munch in various flavours
PORTION CONTROL: Individual bags contain approximately 16-25g per serving, making them perfect for controlled snacking
STORAGE AND FRESHNESS: Each packet is individually sealed to maintain optimal freshness and crispiness, with clear nutritional information on each pack
description: Product description Bring the ultimate snacking experience to your next party, movie night, or office gathering with this massive 60-pack variety box of Walkers favourites. Inside you'll find a delightful mix of Quavers, Baked Wotsits, and Monster Munch in various mouthwatering flavours including cheese, roast beef, pickled onion, and flamin' hot. Each multipack contains perfectly portioned bags ideal for lunchboxes or individual servings. The box features 24 cheese-flavoured treats, alongside other popular varieties, ensuring there's something for everyone's taste buds. These light and crispy snacks are made with quality ingredients and come in convenient individual portions, making them perfect for sharing at social gatherings or stocking up for family snacking. With less plastic packaging and clear nutritional information on each pack, you can make informed snacking choices while enjoying these beloved British crisp varieties. Ingredients Crisps
